steps.title: Use f(5) = 32 to find k
steps.content:
Substitute $x = 5$ into the function definition:
$$f(5) = 4(5) + k(5-1) = 32$$
$$20 + 4k = 32$$
$$4k = 12$$
$$k = 3$$

steps.title: Evaluate f(10) with k = 3
steps.content:
Now that $k = 3$, simplify the original function:
$$f(x) = 4x + 3(x-1) = 4x + 3x - 3 = 7x - 3$$
Evaluate at $x = 10$:
$$f(10) = 7(10) - 3 = 70 - 3 = 67$$
